Rev 14:12.kjv_text: Here is the patience of the saints: here [are] they that keep the commandments of God, and the faith of Jesus.

Rev 12:17.kjv_text: And the dragon was wroth with the woman, and went to make war with the remnant of her seed, which keep the commandments of God, and have the testimony of Jesus Christ.

Rev 22:14.kjv_text: Blessed [are] they that do his commandments, that they may have right to the tree of life, and may enter in through the gates into the city.

Rev 13:10.kjv_text: He that leadeth into captivity shall go into captivity: he that killeth with the sword must be killed with the sword. Here is the patience and the faith of the saints.

Rev 14:6-7.kjv_text: And I saw another angel fly in the midst of heaven, having the everlasting gospel to preach unto them that dwell on the earth, and to every nation, and kindred, and tongue, and people, Saying with a loud voice, Fear God, and give glory to him; for the hour of his judgment is come: and worship him that made heaven, and earth, and the sea, and the fountains of waters.

Rev 14:9-11.kjv_text: And the third angel followed them, saying with a loud voice, If any man worship the beast and his image, and receive [his] mark in his forehead, or in his hand, The same shall drink of the wine of the wrath of God, which is poured out without mixture into the cup of his indignation; and he shall be tormented with fire and brimstone in the presence of the holy angels, and in the presence of the Lamb: And the smoke of their torment ascendeth up for ever and ever: and they have no rest day nor night, who worship the beast and his image, and whosoever receiveth the mark of his name.

Rev 11:19.kjv_text: And the temple of God was opened in heaven, and there was seen in his temple the ark of his testament: and there were lightnings, and voices, and thunderings, and an earthquake, and great hail.

Gal 5:6.kjv_text: For in Jesus Christ neither circumcision availeth any thing, nor uncircumcision; but faith which worketh by love.

1 John 5:3.kjv_text: For this is the love of God, that we keep his commandments: and his commandments are not grievous.

Rom 13:10.kjv_text: Love worketh no ill to his neighbour: therefore love [is] the fulfilling of the law.

Rom 8:4.kjv_text: That the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled in us, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit.

Rom 3:31.kjv_text: Do we then make void the law through faith? God forbid: yea, we establish the law.

1 Cor 7:19.kjv_text: Circumcision is nothing, and uncircumcision is nothing, but the keeping of the commandments of God.

Gen 15:6.kjv_text: And he believed in the LORD; and he counted it to him for righteousness.

Gen 26:5.kjv_text: Because that Abraham obeyed my voice, and kept my charge, my commandments, my statutes, and my laws.

James 2:22-23.kjv_text: Seest thou how faith wrought with his works, and by works was faith made perfect? And the scripture was fulfilled which saith, Abraham believed God, and it was imputed unto him for righteousness: and he was called the Friend of God.

Heb 11:8.kjv_text: By faith Abraham, when he was called to go out into a place which he should after receive for an inheritance, obeyed; and he went out, not knowing whither he went.

Rom 1:5.kjv_text: By whom we have received grace and apostleship, for obedience to the faith among all nations, for his name:

Rom 16:26.kjv_text: But now is made manifest, and by the scriptures of the prophets, according to the commandment of the everlasting God, made known to all nations for the obedience of faith:

Rom 6:16-18.kjv_text: Know ye not, that to whom ye yield yourselves servants to obey, his servants ye are to whom ye obey; whether of sin unto death, or of obedience unto righteousness? But God be thanked, that ye were the servants of sin, but ye have obeyed from the heart that form of doctrine which was delivered you. Being then made free from sin, ye became the servants of righteousness.

Rom 7:7-12.kjv_text: What shall we say then? [Is] the law sin? God forbid. Nay, I had not known sin, but by the law: for I had not known lust, except the law had said, Thou shalt not covet. But sin, taking occasion by the commandment, wrought in me all manner of concupiscence. For without the law sin [was] dead. For I was alive without the law once: but when the commandment came, sin revived, and I died. And the commandment, which [was ordained] to life, I found [to be] unto death. For sin, taking occasion by the commandment, deceived me, and by it slew [me]. Wherefore the law [is] holy, and the commandment holy, and just, and good.

Eph 6:2.kjv_text: Honour thy father and mother; (which is the first commandment with promise;)

Luke 23:56.kjv_text: And they returned, and prepared spices and ointments; and rested the sabbath day according to the commandment.

Ezek 36:27.kjv_text: And I will put my spirit within you, and cause you to walk in my statutes, and ye shall keep my judgments, and do [them].

Phil 2:13.kjv_text: For it is God which worketh in you both to will and to do of [his] good pleasure.

Titus 2:11-12.kjv_text: For the grace of God that bringeth salvation hath appeared to all men, Teaching us that, denying ungodliness and worldly lusts, we should live soberly, righteously, and godly, in this present world;

Eph 2:8-10.kjv_text: For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: [it is] the gift of God: Not of works, lest any man should boast. For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good works, which God hath before ordained that we should walk in them.

John 3:36.kjv_text: He that believeth on the Son hath everlasting life: and he that believeth not the Son shall not see life; but the wrath of God abideth on him.

Eccl 12:13-14.kjv_text: Let us hear the conclusion of the whole matter: Fear God, and keep his commandments: for this [is] the whole [duty] of man. For God shall bring every work into judgment, with every secret thing, whether [it be] good, or whether [it be] evil.

Exo 20:11.kjv_text: For [in] six days the LORD made heaven and earth, the sea, and all that in them [is], and rested the seventh day: wherefore the LORD blessed the sabbath day, and hallowed it.

Rom 6:1-2.kjv_text: What shall we say then? Shall we continue in sin, that grace may abound? God forbid. How shall we, that are dead to sin, live any longer therein?

Rom 6:15.kjv_text: What then? shall we sin, because we are not under the law, but under grace? God forbid.

Gal 2:17.kjv_text: But if, while we seek to be justified by Christ, we ourselves also are found sinners, [is] therefore Christ the minister of sin? God forbid.

Gal 3:21.kjv_text: [Is] the law then against the promises of God? God forbid: for if there had been a law given which could have given life, verily righteousness should have been by the law.

Rev 15:2-3.kjv_text: And I saw as it were a sea of glass mingled with fire: and them that had gotten the victory over the beast, and over his image, and over his mark, [and] over the number of his name, stand on the sea of glass, having the harps of God. And they sing the song of Moses the servant of God, and the song of the Lamb, saying, Great and marvellous [are] thy works, Lord God Almighty; just and true [are] thy ways, thou King of saints.

Deut 10:1-5.kjv_text: At that time the LORD said unto me, Hew thee two tables of stone like unto the first, and come up unto me into the mount, and make thee an ark of wood. And I will write on the tables the words that were in the first tables which thou brakest, and thou shalt put them in the ark. And I made an ark [of] shittim wood, and hewed two tables of stone like unto the first, and went up into the mount, having the two tables in mine hand. And he wrote on the tables, according to the first writing, the ten commandments, which the LORD spake unto you in the mount out of the midst of the fire in the day of the assembly: and the LORD gave them unto me. And I turned myself and came down from the mount, and put the tables in the ark which I had made; and there they be, as the LORD commanded me.

1 Kings 8:9.kjv_text: [There was] nothing in the ark save the two tables of stone, which Moses put there at Horeb, when the LORD made [a covenant] with the children of Israel, when they came out of the land of Egypt.

John 14:15.kjv_text: If ye love me, keep my commandments.

John 15:10.kjv_text: If ye keep my commandments, ye shall abide in my love; even as I have kept my Father's commandments, and abide in his love.

1 John 2:3-4.kjv_text: And hereby we do know that we know him, if we keep his commandments. He that saith, I know him, and keepeth not his commandments, is a liar, and the truth is not in him.

1 John 3:22-24.kjv_text: And whatsoever we ask, we receive of him, because we keep his commandments, and do those things that are pleasing in his sight. And this is his commandment, That we should believe on the name of his Son Jesus Christ, and love one another, as he gave us commandment. And he that keepeth his commandments dwelleth in him, and he in him. And hereby we know that he abideth in us, by the Spirit which he hath given us.

Rom 3:20.kjv_text: Therefore by the deeds of the law there shall no flesh be justified in his sight: for by the law [is] the knowledge of sin.

Rom 4:3.kjv_text: For what saith the scripture? Abraham believed God, and it was counted unto him for righteousness.

Rom 4:10-11.kjv_text: How was it then reckoned? when he was in circumcision, or in uncircumcision? Not in circumcision, but in uncircumcision. And he received the sign of circumcision, a seal of the righteousness of the faith which [he had yet] being uncircumcised: that he might be the father of all them that believe, though they be not circumcised; that righteousness might be imputed unto them also:

Gal 3:6-9.kjv_text: Even as Abraham believed God, and it was accounted to him for righteousness. Know ye therefore that they which are of faith, the same are the children of Abraham. And the scripture, foreseeing that God would justify the heathen through faith, preached before the gospel unto Abraham, [saying], In thee shall all nations be blessed. So then they which be of faith are blessed with faithful Abraham.

Matt 5:17-19.kjv_text: Think not that I am come to destroy the law, or the prophets: I am not come to destroy, but to fulfil. For verily I say unto you, Till heaven and earth pass, one jot or one tittle shall in no wise pass from the law, till all be fulfilled. Whosoever therefore shall break one of these least commandments, and shall teach men so, he shall be called the least in the kingdom of heaven: but whosoever shall do and teach [them], the same shall be called great in the kingdom of heaven.

1 Cor 9:21.kjv_text: To them that are without law, as without law, (being not without law to God, but under the law to Christ,) that I might gain them that are without law.

Rev 2:19.kjv_text: I know thy works, and charity, and service, and faith, and thy patience, and thy works; and the last [to be] more than the first.

Rev 3:10.kjv_text: Because thou hast kept the word of my patience, I also will keep thee from the hour of temptation, which shall come upon all the world, to try them that dwell upon the earth.

Heb 11:17-19.kjv_text: By faith Abraham, when he was tried, offered up Isaac: and he that had received the promises offered up his only begotten [son], Of whom it was said, That in Isaac shall thy seed be called: Accounting that God [was] able to raise [him] up, even from the dead; from whence also he received him in a figure.

Rom 10:4.kjv_text: For Christ [is] the end of the law for righteousness to every one that believeth.

Jer 31:33.kjv_text: But this [shall be] the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel; After those days, saith the LORD, I will put my law in their inward parts, and write it in their hearts; and will be their God, and they shall be my people.

Heb 8:10.kjv_text: For this [is] the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel after those days, saith the Lord; I will put my laws into their mind, and write them in their hearts: and I will be to them a God, and they shall be to me a people:

1 John 5:2.kjv_text: By this we know that we love the children of God, when we love God, and keep his commandments.

Rev 22:15.kjv_text: For without [are] dogs, and sorcerers, and whoremongers, and murderers, and idolaters, and whosoever loveth and maketh a lie.

Rom 3:22.kjv_text: Even the righteousness of God [which is] by faith of Jesus Christ unto all and upon all them that believe: for there is no difference:

Gal 2:16.kjv_text: Knowing that a man is not justified by the works of the law, but by the faith of Jesus Christ, even we have believed in Jesus Christ, that we might be justified by the faith of Christ, and not by the works of the law: for by the works of the law shall no flesh be justified.

Phil 3:9.kjv_text: And be found in him, not having mine own righteousness, which is of the law, but that which is through the faith of Christ, the righteousness which is of God by faith:

Rev 2:13.kjv_text: I know thy works, and where thou dwellest, [even] where Satan's seat [is]: and thou holdest fast my name, and hast not denied my faith, even in those days wherein Antipas [was] my faithful martyr, who was slain among you, where Satan dwelleth.

Gal 3:22.kjv_text: But the scripture hath concluded all under sin, that the promise by faith of Jesus Christ might be given to them that believe.

Titus 2:14.kjv_text: Who gave himself for us, that he might redeem us from all iniquity, and purify unto himself a peculiar people, zealous of good works.

Titus 3:8.kjv_text: [This is] a faithful saying, and these things I will that thou affirm constantly, that they which have believed in God might be careful to maintain good works. These things are good and profitable unto men.

focus_areas.title: Which commandments? Entolas tou theou = the Decalogue
The pistis Iesou genitive: subjective, objective, or both?
The Abrahamic pattern: faith first, obedience after
The faith-love-law chain (Gal 5:6 → 1 John 5:3 → Rom 13:10 → Rom 8:4 → Rom 3:31)
The terountes participle: DESCRIBES saints, not PRESCRIBES conditions
Paul's me genoito denials: the wall against antinomianism
Works as cause vs. works as fruit: the vocabulary distinction
The hode inclusio: Rev 13:10 + 14:12 bracket the beast crisis
The dual identification formula: commandments never stand alone in Revelation
